specific_mechanism: WH-Attn: split self-attention kernel symbol into causal+anticausal factors via Wiener-Hopf multiplicative factorization; causal half handles prefill, anticausal aux handles non-causal context.
llm_application: Attention kernel built as a half-line operator with learned symbol; symbol = symbol_+ symbol_-; prefill via symbol_+, decode adds anticausal aux head via symbol_-; reassembly with bounded reconstruction error.
novelty_claim: PAT/TyphoonMLA optimize prefix/prefill at the systems level; none use multiplicative symbol factorization as primitive.
content_words: hardy space half line attention kernel
mixed naive absorb MLA prefill decode

source_side: hardy space half line attention kernel
llm_side: mixed naive absorb MLA prefill decode
